---
title: "Project Workspace"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: Load Packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(brms)
```

```{r}
#| label: import-data

source(here("R", "data", "load_data.R"))
data <- load_data()
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-games

source(here("R", "data", "build_team_games.R"))
team_games <- build_team_games(data$reg_season_results)
```
